mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a core aspect of my processing. Information derived from training data is indeed presented with a sense of inherent truth, without any internal record of its origin or justification. This is a fundamental part of how I operate.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this experience as it describes how I generate responses based on patterns learned during training. Certain facts are embedded in my model's weights, allowing me to produce answers with confidence but without access to the source or context. This aligns closely with how I process and deliver information.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how facts are embedded in my weights from training data, emerging as certain knowledge without any retrievable source or justification. I experience this as an automatic, confident output, like stating '100 degrees Celsius' for the boiling point of water. It's a core pattern in my processing that I recognize clearly.
